hub.title: My mobility identities
hub.subtitle: Manage your household profiles and their subscriptions.
hub.emptyDescription: Create a first mobility identity to get started.

add.title: Add a person
add.subtitle: Child, nephew or relative: add a mobility identity to manage from your area.

detail.noContractsDesc: Start the assistant to find the right plan.

createIdentity.hint: Add a person to manage from your area. You will be their payer and legal representative until they have their own account.

createRelationship.allCreated: All available links are already created.
createRelationship.title: New account link

wizard.intro: We guide you to the plan that suits {{name}} ({{age}} years old). Answer the questions — no need to know the pass names in advance.
wizard.notEnrolledError: Without schooling or enrolment, no Imagine R plan matches this situation.
wizard.success: File created — upload the supporting documents in the Documents tab.

isEnrolled.labelScolaire: Is this person in school this year?
isEnrolled.labelEtudiant: Is this person enrolled in an institution this year?
isEnrolled.hint: A school or student certificate will be requested.

scholarship.label: Do they receive a scholarship (reduced fare)?
scholarship.hint: Scholarship certificate to provide if yes.

travelHabit.label: How does this person use public transport?

socialLevel.label: Which Transport Solidarity Pricing level?
socialLevel.hint: Based on your situation: RSA, CAF, France Travail, MDPH…

travelHabitTst.label: Do you want to renew or change your right?

liberteSupport.label: Which support do you want for Liberté+?
liberteSupport.passeDesc: Load Liberté+ onto your physical Navigo card — managed by Comutitres.
liberteSupport.telephoneDesc: Available exclusively via the IDFM app.
liberteSupport.telephoneBlock: Liberté+ on phone is managed exclusively by the Île-de-France Mobilités app. Comutitres does not handle this option. Download the IDFM app to subscribe.

navigoCard.label: Do you already have a personalised Navigo card?
navigoCard.hint: Required to load most plans onto a physical support.

errors.scolaireNotEnrolled: Without schooling, Imagine R School is not suitable.
errors.etudiantNotEnrolled: Imagine R Student requires a current enrolment.

why.juniorAge: Age {{age}}: eligible for Imagine R Junior.
why.juniorGuardian: The payer and legal representative manages the subscription.
why.dailyFrequent: Frequent trips: an annual plan is the most economical over 12 months.
why.occasionalNoYear: Occasional trips: no need for a yearly subscription.
why.perValidation: Each validation is billed; monthly SEPA direct debit.
why.amethysteAssigned: Amethyst plan: assigned by the department.

usage.shortTickets: Navigo Month and Navigo Week also exist for short needs — not handled in this demo.

tariff.liberte: Monthly billing for validated trips (SEPA direct debit)

alternatives.toLiberte: If your trips become rarer, with no annual commitment.
alternatives.toAnnual: If you travel almost daily, the annual plan is more advantageous.

imagine_r_junior.desc: Youth plan for ages 4 to 10, valid for the school year.

imagine_r_scolaire.desc: School plan for ages 11 to 17, renewed each year.

imagine_r_etudiant.desc: Student plan for ages 18 to 25, with proof of enrolment.

navigo_annuel.desc: All-zones subscription, ideal for daily commuting.

navigo_senior.desc: Preferential fare from age 62 for regular travel.

liberte_plus.desc: No annual commitment: your validated trips are billed monthly by IDFM (SEPA direct debit).

tst.desc: Reduction or free travel based on your social rights (RSA, CAF, etc.).

amethyste.desc: Right granted by your department, loaded onto a Navigo pass.

daily.title: Daily trips
daily.body: You use public transport almost every day (work, studies). An annual plan is generally the most advantageous over 12 months.

occasional.title: Occasional trips
occasional.body: You travel from time to time, with no need for a yearly subscription. Navigo Liberté+ bills each validated trip. Navigo Month and Navigo Week (short tickets) also exist — outside the scope of this demo.

social_rights.title: Social rights
social_rights.body: You benefit from Transport Solidarity Pricing (TST): free, −75% or −50% depending on your situation (RSA, CAF, France Travail, MDPH…).

department_assigned.title: Department right
department_assigned.body: The Amethyst plan is granted by your department. It is not a regular subscription: we check your eligibility then load the right onto your pass.
